# Testing Utilities

When developing new YAML features, ingestion schemas, or wrangling rules, you can use these developer test scripts to verify your logic instantly without booting up the entire Shiny dashboard.

Ensure your [Python Environment](python_environment.qmd) is completely activated before running these tests.

## 1. Testing the Manifest Loader
Use this script to verify that your nested `!include` logic binds properly into a master configuration file and that all dictionary schemas are correctly sized.

```python
{{< include ../../libs/utils/tests/test_config_loader.py >}}
```

**Get Help (Available Arguments):**
```bash
python libs/utils/tests/test_config_loader.py --help
```

**Run it:**
```bash
python libs/utils/tests/test_config_loader.py --yaml config/manifests/pipelines/1_Abromics_general_pipeline.yaml
```

## 2. Testing the Ingestion Layer
Use this script to verify that the file paths in your data contract exist on disk, that they load correctly via Polars, and that the physical columns match your defined `_fields.yaml` schemas.
*This script DOES NOT perform data wrangling.*

```python
{{< include ../../libs/ingestion/tests/test_ingestion.py >}}
```

**Get Help (Available Arguments):**
```bash
python libs/ingestion/tests/test_ingestion.py --help
```

**Run it:**
```bash
python libs/ingestion/tests/test_ingestion.py \
    --yaml config/manifests/pipelines/1_Abromics_general_pipeline.yaml \
    --data tmp/
```

## 3. Testing the Transformer (Wrangler) Layer
Use this script to verify that the mathematical logic inside your `_wrangling.yaml` files exactly manipulates the Polars dataframes as intended (e.g. standardizing nulls, deriving phenotypic categories).

This script prints a complete 5-row preview of your successfully wrangled dataframe!

```python
{{< include ../../libs/transformer/tests/test_wrangler.py >}}
```

**Get Help (Available Arguments):**
```bash
python libs/transformer/tests/test_wrangler.py --help
```

**Run it:**
```bash
python libs/transformer/tests/test_wrangler.py \
    --yaml config/manifests/pipelines/1_Abromics_general_pipeline.yaml \
    --data tmp/
```
